title: FEMUR Per-AID Manifest
description: Schema for the manifest produced in each per-AID subdirectory when using --bucket-by-aid. File is named manifest--{cid}--{aid}--{epoch}.json.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp (with timezone) when the export run started.

command.description: Full CLI command with arguments used to generate this output.

counts.description: Record counts per dataset for this specific AID.

applications.description: Number of application records for this host.

vulnerabilities.description: Number of vulnerability records for this host.

assessments.description: Number of assessment records for this host.

iavm_date_generated.description: Date the IAVM cross-reference XML was generated. Present only when --iavm-file is used.

iavm_summary.description: IAVM notice counts by severity for this host. Present only when --iavm-file is used and matches exist.

CAT I.description: Count of CAT I (Critical) IAVM notices affecting this host.

CAT II.description: Count of CAT II (High) IAVM notices affecting this host.

CAT III.description: Count of CAT III (Medium/Low) IAVM notices affecting this host.
